hero.title: AURA ELITE RESIDENCE
hero.subtitle: Architectural Masterpiece - Pinnacle of Luxury Living

overview.title: Discover Aura Elite
overview.subtitle: A new symbol of elite lifestyle in the heart of the financial district, where contemporary design meets supreme luxury.

handover.title: Premium Handover Standards
handover.subtitle: Every interior detail is strictly curated from the leading heritage brands in Europe.

kitchen.title: Imperial Kitchen Area
kitchen.desc: Premium kitchen cabinets and home appliances by Miele (Germany) with scratch-resistant natural quartz countertops.

smartHome.title: Comprehensive Smart Home
smartHome.desc: Schneider (France) smart home management system integrated with voice control, scenario lighting, and automatic curtains.

bathroom.title: 5-Star Resort Bathroom
bathroom.desc: Fully equipped with gold-plated sanitary fittings by Gessi (Italy) and Duravit solid-cast porcelain bathtubs.

flooring.title: Imported Natural Hardwood
flooring.desc: 15mm thick North American Walnut flooring, treated for moisture resistance and ultra-luxury hotel standard soundproofing.

gallery.title: Artistic Photo Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Admire the captures of the artistic and high-class living spaces at Aura Elite.

contact.title: Register for Consultation & Tour
contact.subtitle: Leave your details, and our senior consultancy team will reach out to you within 15 minutes.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.success: Information sent successfully! We will contact you shortly.

products.title: Model Apartment Portfolio
products.subtitle: Select a refined living space tailored precisely to your family's lifestyle and status.

1-bedroom.name: Aura Suite 1-Bedroom
1-bedroom.tagline: The genesis of sophisticated modern living
1-bedroom.viewVal: Serene park landscape & resort swimming pool
1-bedroom.handoverHighlight: Miele kitchen setup (Germany), Hafele smart key system.

2-bedroom.name: Aura Signature 2-Bedroom
2-bedroom.tagline: Cosy and elegant living space for elite families
2-bedroom.viewVal: Direct panoramic view of Saigon River & Yacht Marina
2-bedroom.handoverHighlight: Gessi bathroom fittings (Italy), Daikin centralized ducted AC.

penthouse.name: Aura Imperial Penthouse
penthouse.tagline: Declaration of status above the clouds
penthouse.viewVal: 360-degree city center skyline and river scenery
penthouse.handoverHighlight: Private infinity balcony pool, Triple Low-E sound/heat insulated glazing.

duplex.name: Aura Royal Duplex
duplex.viewVal: Radiant financial district avenues and Landmark 81
duplex.handoverHighlight: Double-height 6.5m ceiling, natural Greek Marble flooring in living room.
